main_strength: The report correctly identifies key trends in the provided FRED data, such as the upward movement in DGS10 and CPIAUCSL, and links them to relevant Mishkin concepts.
main_weakness: The explanation of the derived macro signals is somewhat superficial and lacks deeper analytical depth.
revision_advice: Expand on the interpretation of the derived macro signals, providing more context and connecting them more explicitly to the broader macroeconomic landscape.
